ham.subject: Your Flight Itinerary – Confirmation and Details
ham.body:
Dear [Name],

Thank you for choosing XYZ Airlines for your travel needs. Below is the confirmation of your upcoming flight:

Flight Number: XYZ 1234
Departure: Los Angeles International Airport (LAX) – 12:05 PM, March 15, 2026
Arrival: John F. Kennedy International Airport (JFK) – 8:45 PM, March 15, 2026
Seat Assignment: 12A, Window
Baggage Allowance: 1 checked bag (up to 23 kg) + 1 carry‑on

Check‑in: Please arrive at the airport at least 2 hours before departure. Online check‑in is available up to 24 hours before your flight.

Should you need any assistance or wish to make changes to your booking, feel free to contact our customer service team at 1-800-XYZ-1234 or email support@xyzairlines.com.

We look forward to welcoming you aboard and wish you a pleasant journey.

Sincerely,

XYZ Airlines Customer Support

spam.subject: URGENT: Immediate Action Required – Your FedEx/DHL Shipment
spam.body:
Dear Valued Customer,

We regret to inform you that your recent shipment with FedEx/DHL (Tracking # 123456789) was not delivered due to an outstanding balance. To release the package and avoid additional penalties, you must settle the fee within the next 48 hours.

Failure to act will result in the shipment being returned to the sender and an additional fee of $75.00 being added to your account. Your access to future shipments may also be suspended pending payment.

To verify your account and submit payment securely, please click the link below:

<URL>

We appreciate your prompt attention to this matter and thank you for choosing FedEx/DHL.

Sincerely,

FedEx Customer Service
